_note: Synthetic recorded output for --dry-run, crafted to show a realistic IMPERFECT result on the harder fixture: some partial-overlap matches, a wrong-code false positive (Uncertainty on a waiting-list span that is really an Access barrier), two missed gold codings (Informal support; the second Access barrier), and one hallucinated span dropped at anchor. Replace with real model output via --live for a meaningful baseline.

codings.codedText: the website kept crashing and I gave up for weeks
a social worker called me back, which finally
nobody explained what would happen next
the waiting list was months long
I never heard back from anyone
